markup.tree: [{"at":410,"attrs":[{"at":419,"end":462,"kind":"str","name":"title","value":"Diagnostics — render/commit metrics","vat":426}],"children":[{"at":467,"attrs":[{"at":474,"end":546,"kind":"expr","name":"text","value":"\"renders: %d    commits: %d\" % [rep[\"renders\"], rep[\"commits\"]]","vat":481}],"children":[],"line":17,"t":"el","tag":"Label"},{"at":553,"attrs":[{"at":560,"end":673,"kind":"expr","name":"text","value":"\"placements: %d    updates: %d    deletions: %d\" % [rep[\"placements\"], rep[\"updates\"], rep[\"deletions\"]]","vat":567}],"children":[],"line":18,"t":"el","tag":"Label"},{"at":680,"attrs":[{"at":687,"end":764,"kind":"str","name":"text","value":"captured after the last click's commit (displaying is itself a render)","vat":693},{"at":765,"end":814,"kind":"expr","name":"style","value":"{\"font_color\": Color(0.55, 0.55, 0.55)}","vat":773}],"children":[],"line":19,"t":"el","tag":"Label"},{"at":821,"attrs":[{"at":827,"end":854,"kind":"expr","name":"style","value":"{\"separation\": 8}","vat":835}],"children":[{"at":860,"attrs":[{"at":868,"end":891,"kind":"str","name":"text","value":"Trigger a render","vat":874},{"at":892,"end":937,"kind":"expr","name":"onClick","value":"func(): tick[1].call(tick[0] + 1)","vat":902}],"children":[],"line":21,"t":"el","tag":"Button"},{"at":945,"attrs":[{"at":953,"end":974,"kind":"str","name":"text","value":"Reset counters","vat":959},{"at":975,"end":995,"kind":"expr","name":"onClick","value":"do_reset","vat":985}],"children":[],"line":22,"t":"el","tag":"Button"}],"line":20,"t":"el","tag":"HBox"}],"line":16,"t":"el","tag":"DemoBox"}]
